fields.i_receive: 47% of your debugging skills, gone within months
fields.you_receive: an AI that requires debugging skills to supervise

narrative_summary: The joke frames the agentic coding dependency loop as a comically lopsided trade offer — you hand over your debugging expertise and in return get a tool that only works if you still have it.
rationale: Candidate 2 earns the win by weaponizing the exact 47% stat from the article and crystallizing the paradox into a genuinely lopsided trade offer — you give away the skill, you get back a tool that demands the skill — which is a structurally perfect fit for the Trade Offer template and lands a real punchline rather than restating the setup.
place: at a VC pitch where the demo is actively hallucinating
